target: 6. I Will Accept Everything

Ah, there you are!
Hizuru-san and Nezu-san!

Ah.
We should be able to get out of town soon.

Hah, hah…
It's been a while since I ran like this, hasn't it?
Moreover, you're carrying a girl like this, aren't you?
It might have been tough… but I can't say thanks.

Thanks aren't needed.
I didn't let the monk's spirit go to waste, that's all.
You don't seem convinced.
…What should I do?

It's already decided.
The foothill is near.
Just go down to town like this.
Really… you think that's okay?
What are you trying to say?

Is this the only ending?
Wasn't there something else I could have done?
Did Ryunosuke have to be the sacrifice?
And… Haine's situation too…
Teacher…

If you say things like that…
We'd be…
(The past can't be changed, can it…)

(We knew the ending.
Yet we couldn't save Ryunosuke-san…)
(Maybe by interfering halfway, we only made things worse for the teacher)
That kind of…

Just be quiet for a while…
I need to think.
Hmph. Do whatever you want.

…Straw.
You have some, don't you?
Yes… here it is.

If you're really a time traveler,
can you guide me?
To the best possible future.
Eh…?

Really… am I allowed to just go back to town?
Leaving Ryunosuke and Haine behind?
I know that's what Ryunosuke wanted…

But is this the future you knew?
Can we really end it like this?
Wouldn't that just bring worse futures?
Hizuru-san…

The last words of Ryunosuke,
and Haine's cries of pain…
They're still in my ears.

Ryunosuke's thoughts weren't in vain.
But if there's any chance to create a better future…

I won't hesitate anymore.
Hey, straw, what should I do?
Shinpei… what are we going to do?
(It's not a question with an easy answer)

(The best future for the teacher…
What kind of future is that?)

(Ryunosuke-san probably won't be saved.
And this incident will make the teacher and Nezu get involved with the Shadow…)
(In 14 years, we'll fight the Shadow again on this island)

If we defeat Haine now…
Maybe we can avoid that future.

Wait… Shinpei.
You said to defeat Haine?

Yeah, I don't know why,
but Haine seems to regret attacking Ryunosuke-san
and is in a state of confusion.

Either way, now is the chance
to defeat Haine while she's confused.

That might be true…
But we can't defeat Haine.

In the end, it might just send Hizuru-san and Nezu-san
back to Haine again.

I know that.
And if we do that, we don't know
what will happen to our future.
So we need to think carefully…
Straw, can't you reach a conclusion yet?
Eh, yeah…

I promise.
No matter the result of following your guidance,
I'll accept everything.

So I'm asking you.
Please guide me.
(You trust us this much, Teacher…)

(You just appeared out of nowhere,
and all you do is meddle…)

(You even consider my judgment
as something you truly need…)
(Then I'll…)
Teacher Nagumo…
"Please think about surviving."
"Let's defeat Haine."

Right now, please think about surviving.
For the sake of Ryunosuke-san who sacrificed himself.

That's surely the choice
that will lead to the best future.
So… that's it.

(Even if this is the perfect opportunity
to defeat Haine…)
(We don't have a plan to definitely defeat Haine)

(Moreover, I can't put the teacher
in any more danger)
Let's defeat Haine.
The Haine now isn't the Haine who was your friend.

Moreover… in the future we know,
Haine will bring tragedy to the entire island.
So…

End the cause while you still can…
That's what you mean, right?
